strategistNote.title: PINS earnings tomorrow (May 4). Warsh replaces Powell May 15. AED 115K deployment pending Hormuz.
strategistNote.body: May 3, 2026. ⚠️ CRITICAL: PINS Q1 earnings Monday May 4 after close — 1,429 RSU shares carry binary risk + active securities fraud lawsuit. UAE zero CGT = full proceeds deployable. Decide before Monday open. MSTR Q1 reports May 5 — proxy BTC sentiment signal (holds 818K BTC @ $75.5K avg). Kevin Warsh replaces Powell May 15: near-term USD rebound expected, hawkish inflation focus, 2 cuts priced H2 2026. Wait for dollar peak before deploying AED 115K. BTC $78K: April ETF inflows hit $1.97B record — cycle intact, accumulate on dips to $74-76K. Gold $4,612: strongest position, hold through Warsh transition — TP1 $5,200. QQQ $674 at 52wk high — TP1 $729 is 8% away, do not chase. AED 115K deployment trigger: Hormuz fully reopened + 2 confirmed weeks. Staking: start ETH (Lido 3-4%) and SOL (Jito 7-8%) when capital unlocks.
strategistNote.stalenessWarning: This note is manually updated. Use 'Regenerate Analysis' for AI-generated live analysis.

warStatus.status: CEASEFIRE EXTENDED — FRAGILE / HORMUZ STILL BLOCKED
warStatus.description: Original 2-week ceasefire (Apr 7) expired. Trump extended ~Apr 21 but briefly. US counter-blockade of Hormuz active since Apr 13. Iran seized ships Apr 22. Peace talks stalling as of May 2026. Oil storage nearly full. Iran losing ~$500M/day. No diplomatic resolution in sight.

triggers.label: Ceasefire extended post-expiry
triggers.detail: Trump extended ~Apr 21, but fragile — US counter-blockade active

triggers.label: Hormuz fully reopened
triggers.detail: Strait still blocked as of May 3. Iran/US talks stalled.

triggers.label: New deployment thesis defined
triggers.detail: 40% BTC/ETH + 30% quality tech (TSM/AVGO) + 20% stables + 10% SOL staking

actionItems.label: 🚨 PINS RSU — Decide before Monday open. Q1 earnings May 4 after close. Binary risk + fraud lawsuit. UAE = zero CGT, ~$28K fully deployable. Options: sell all, sell 50%, or hold.
🏛️ Powell exits May 15, Warsh takes over. Near-term USD rebound expected — do NOT rush AED 115K deployment. Wait for dollar peak signal post May 15.
📊 MSTR Q1 earnings May 5 — BTC sentiment signal. Holds 818K BTC @ $75.5K avg. Watch for BTC reaction and possible $80K breakout attempt.
🥇 Gold $4,612 — strongest position. Hold conviction through Warsh transition. TP1 $5,200 / TP2 $5,800. GDX high-beta leverage on gold move.
₿ BTC $78K — accumulate at $74-76K dip. ETF inflows $1.97B April record. Cycle intact. SL $70K. Target: 0.1 BTC total before year end.
📈 QQQ $674 at 52wk high — TP1 $729 is 8% away. Do not buy at the high. Wait for 5-7% pullback. Next FOMC June 17 is Warsh's first decision.
🔑 Smart Portfolio consolidation — collapse from 6 to 2 (BigTech + GoldWorldWide). Liquidate RenewableEnergy, CyberSecurity, InTheGame, EuropeDefense.
📡 Start staking once capital unlocks: ETH via Lido (3-4% APR), SOL via Jito (7-8% APR). UAE zero CGT = all yield is yours.

events.label: 🚨 PINS Q1 2026 Earnings — after close. RSU decision must happen BEFORE open. Fraud lawsuit active. UAE = zero CGT.
📊 MSTR Q1 Earnings — holds 818K BTC @ $75.5K avg. Key BTC sentiment signal. Watch overnight BTC reaction.
🏦 BOE Rate Decision — Expected hold at 4.5%. UK sticky inflation. GBP volatility watch.
📉 US PPI April — Producer prices. Warsh's inflation read. Higher = more hawkish near-term.
🔥 US CPI April 2026 — Warsh's incoming inflation baseline. Critical for USD trajectory and rate cut timeline.
🛒 Walmart Q1 FY2027 Earnings — consumer health read. Discretionary spending signal for QQQ thesis.
🏛️ Powell exits Fed — Kevin Warsh takes over as Chair. USD regime change watch. Near-term rebound expected before eventual cuts.
🤖 NVDA Q1 FY2027 Earnings — $78B guide, consensus $78.8B. Bar high. Only pops on Q2 guide >$85B. Watchlist entry signal.
📊 S&P Global PMI Flash US+EU — Business activity. TSM and AVGO sensitive to manufacturing PMI read.
📉 US GDP Q1 2026 Final Revision — Tariff impact. Advance estimate -0.3%. Deeper revision = Fed pivot pressure.
🏦 ECB Rate Decision — Cut expected -25bps to 2.0%. USD/EUR divergence if Warsh holds rates.
🔥 US CPI May 2026 — Last inflation data before Warsh's first FOMC decision June 17. Critical.
📅 FOMC June — Warsh's FIRST rate decision + press conference. Market pricing 0-25bps cut. Watch USD, gold, BTC reaction.
🤖 AVGO Q2 FY2026 Earnings (est.) — Watchlist. Custom AI silicon revenue, hyperscaler pipeline update.
🔥 US CPI June 2026 — Pre-July FOMC. Gold and BTC sensitive to this print.
📌 PINS Q2 2026 Earnings (est.) — Q1 inflection will define Q2 trajectory. Active position.
🔧 TSM Q2 2026 Earnings (est.) — AI chip order flow. Direct impact on TSM position (+34%). Watch NVIDIA data center demand commentary.
📅 FOMC July — Second Warsh decision. 1st cut likely if CPI cooperates. 2 total H2 cuts in consensus.
🔥 US CPI July 2026 — Mid-cycle check. Will determine if Sept FOMC is live.
🤖 NVDA Q2 FY2027 Earnings (est.) — Blackwell ramp cycle data. Watchlist entry catalyst if guides >$90B.
⚔️ Hormuz Active War — 5% of pre-war traffic. US Navy blockade since Apr 13. Iran losing $500M/day. Reopen = AED 115K deployment trigger.

geopolitical.notes: Original ceasefire expired ~Apr 21, Trump extended briefly. US counter-blockade of Hormuz active since Apr 13. Iran seized ships Apr 22. Peace talks stalling. Oil prices rising on renewed risk premium. Monitor daily.

bullRunWatchlist.label: Broadcom
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: JPMorgan #1 AI infrastructure pick. Custom silicon for hyperscalers (Google, Meta, Apple). $571B AI capex flows through AVGO. Golden cross confirmed. Revenues up 50%+ YoY.
bullRunWatchlist.source: JPMorgan top pick Apr 2026, Goldman Sachs AI infrastructure thesis
catalysts: Q2 earnings June 25 (est.) — AI networking pipeline

bullRunWatchlist.label: Freeport-McMoRan
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: Copper supercycle in full swing. AI data centers need 475kmt/yr copper by 2026 (JPMorgan). 330kmt structural deficit forecast. Grasberg ramp + global EV buildout. Stock +40% YoY, still in early supercycle innings.
bullRunWatchlist.source: Goldman Sachs copper supercycle thesis, JPMorgan 330kmt deficit forecast

bullRunWatchlist.label: Nvidia
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: Undisputed AI GPU monopoly. $571B AI capex all flows through NVDA at some point. Bullish wedge breakout confirmed post-correction. Blackwell cycle still in early innings. Slight overbought — buy dips only.

bullRunWatchlist.label: Vertiv Holdings
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: The picks-and-shovels AI play nobody talks about. Powers and cools every AI data center. Margins expanding. Goldman Sachs and Zacks both flagged as top 2026 buy alongside NVDA/AVGO. Massively underpriced vs AI chip stocks.
bullRunWatchlist.source: Goldman Sachs 2026 top picks, Zacks top AI infrastructure 2026

bullRunWatchlist.label: iShares Silver Trust
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: SLV has ALREADY RUN — now at $68 (entry zone was $28-33, fully expired). Do not chase. Wait for 10-15% pullback to $58-62 before entering. War/inflation premium baked in. Warsh Fed transition could extend the metals run.
bullRunWatchlist.source: Entry zone updated May 3, 2026 — original $28-33 zone expired. SLV now at $68.

bullRunWatchlist.label: Southern Copper Corp
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: World's lowest-cost copper producer. Peru + Mexico mines = lowest AISC globally. Trades near all-time highs but copper supercycle justifies premium. Higher quality play vs FCX with better dividend yield.
bullRunWatchlist.source: AInvest copper bull cycle analysis, Goldman Sachs copper demand forecast

bullRunWatchlist.label: Ethereum
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: 56% gap to cycle high of $4,953. Pectra upgrade live — improves staking and validator efficiency. Institutional ETF inflows accelerating. Underperformed BTC this cycle — mean reversion due. Lido staking 3-4% APR while waiting.
bullRunWatchlist.source: BeInCrypto Pectra analysis, CoinDCX bull run signals 2026

bullRunWatchlist.label: Marvell Technology
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: JPMorgan top pick for custom silicon + AI networking. Building custom AI ASICs for Amazon and Google. Near-term overbought (RSI 70+). Don't chase — wait for 10-15% pullback then buy aggressively.

bullRunWatchlist.label: Solana
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: 48.8% institutional ownership of spot SOL ETF — highest of any crypto product. Fastest-growing Layer 1. $600M+ weekly DEX volume. Jito staking 7-8% APR (MEV-boosted). High risk, high reward.
